full_name: ANSI/CAN/UL 1973:2022 - Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary and Motive Auxiliary Power Applications (Third Edition)
ocr_quality: 良好（PDF 直接提取，英文內容完整，但部分頁面有版權水印）

conditions.soc: 放電至製造商規定的 EODV
conditions.charging_rate: 電池組規定的最大充電速率
conditions.fault_condition: 充電電路單一故障（可能導致過充）
conditions.monitoring: 使用火花點火源或氣體檢測監測可燃氣體

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無可燃氣體、無有毒氣體、無電擊、無洩漏、無破裂、保護控制正常

exemptions: 若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 15 Overcharge Test: A fully discharged sample is to be subjected to the maximum specified charging rate with a single fault condition in the charging circuit. The test continues until ultimate results occur. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

conditions.soc: 放電至製造商規定的 EODV
conditions.charging_rate: 高於正常充電速率（按製造商規格或單一故障條件）
conditions.fault_condition: 充電電路單一故障（可能導致高倍率充電）

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無可燃氣體、無有毒氣體、無電擊、無洩漏、無破裂、保護控制正常

exemptions: 若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 16 High Rate Charge: The sample is subjected to high rate charging with a single fault condition. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

conditions.fault_condition: 放電保護電路單一元件故障
conditions.duration: 完全放電或溫度達到峰值/穩定狀態後 7 小時
conditions.monitoring: 使用火花點火源或氣體檢測監測可燃氣體

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無可燃氣體、無有毒氣體、無電擊、無洩漏、無破裂、保護控制正常

exemptions: 若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 17 Short Circuit Test: The sample is short-circuited with a resistance ≤ 20 mΩ. A single fault condition is applied to the discharge protection circuit. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

conditions.discharge_rate: 高於正常放電速率（按製造商規格或單一故障條件）
conditions.fault_condition: 放電電路單一故障（可能導致過載）

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無可燃氣體、無有毒氣體、無電擊、無洩漏、無破裂、保護控制正常

exemptions: 若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 18 Overload Under Discharge: The sample is subjected to overload discharge with a single fault condition. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

conditions.discharge_rate: 製造商規定的最大放電速率
termination_criteria: 最小電壓/最大溫度保護啟動
達到正常放電限值後 30 分鐘
conditions.monitoring: 使用火花點火源或氣體檢測監測可燃氣體

criteria.description: 保護裝置應啟動防止電池低於截止電壓；應無起火、無爆炸等

exemptions: 若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 19 Overdischarge Protection Test: The DUT is discharged until the protection device activates. Protection shall prevent cells from going below cut-off voltage. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

tests.test_name_zh: 溫度和工作限值檢查測試
tests.test_name_en: Temperature and Operating Limits Check Test

conditions.soc: 放電至 EODV 後充電至 MOSOC
conditions.ambient_temperature: 製造商規定的最高/最低工作溫度
conditions.monitoring: 監測模組電壓/電流及溫度敏感元件（包括電池）

criteria.description: 製造商規定的限值（電壓、電流、溫度）不得超出；元件溫度不得超出其規格

tests.original_text_snippet: 20 Temperature and Operating Limits Check: The DUT is operated at maximum/minimum ambient temperatures through charge/discharge cycles. Manufacturer limits shall not be exceeded.

conditions.soc: 創建不平衡狀態（部分模組放電至不同 SOC）
conditions.monitoring: 監測模組電壓是否超出限值

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；模組最大電壓限值不得超出

tests.original_text_snippet: 21 Imbalanced Charging Test: An imbalanced condition is created by discharging modules to different SOC levels. The sample is then charged. Module voltage limits shall not be exceeded.

conditions.test_voltage: 按標準規定（通常為 2×額定電壓或更高）
conditions.application: 危險電壓電路與非載流導電部件之間

criteria.description: 應無介電擊穿（絕緣擊穿導致短路/飛弧）

exemptions: 半導體或類似電子元件可能被旁路或斷開（若易受測試電壓損壞）
tests.original_text_snippet: 22 Dielectric Voltage Withstand Test: Hazardous voltage circuits are subjected to dielectric withstand voltage. No dielectric breakdown shall occur.

conditions.test_current: 按標準規定（通常為 25 A 或更高）
conditions.measurement: 測量保護接地系統任意兩點之間的電阻

criteria.description: 保護接地系統電阻不超過規定限值（通常≤0.1 Ω）

tests.original_text_snippet: 23 Continuity Test: The grounding system resistance is measured. Resistance shall not exceed specified limit.

tests.test_name_zh: 冷卻/熱穩定系統失效測試
tests.test_name_en: Failure of Cooling/Thermal Stability System Test

conditions.soc_charge: 放電至 EODV，在高溫環境下，冷卻系統禁用，以最大速率充電
conditions.soc_discharge: 充滿電（MOSOC），在高溫環境下，冷卻系統禁用，以最大速率放電
conditions.monitoring: 使用火花點火源或氣體檢測監測可燃氣體

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；或系統應安全關閉

exemptions: 若通過分析確定冷卻系統不運作不會產生危險，可豁免
tests.original_text_snippet: 24 Failure of Cooling/Thermal Stability System Test: The DUT is charged/discharged with cooling system disabled. System shall shut down safely or no hazardous condition shall occur.

tests.test_name_zh: 電磁兼容性測試（6 項）

conditions.monitoring: 監測系統功能是否正常

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護功能應正常運作

exemptions: 若固態電路和軟體不被用作主要安全保護，可豁免
tests.original_text_snippet: 27 Electromagnetic Immunity Tests: Includes ESD, RF field, fast transient, surge, RF common mode, power frequency magnetic field. Protection functions shall remain operational.

tests.test_name_zh: 振動測試（LER 動力和 VAP 應用）
tests.test_name_en: Vibration Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications)
tests.applicability: 輕軌（LER）動力和車輛輔助電源（VAP）應用

conditions.profile: 按預期車輛振動輪廓或標準規定

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護控制正常

exemptions: 僅適用於 LER 動力和 VAP 應用
若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 28 Vibration Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications): The sample is subjected to vibration profile representative of vehicle application. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

tests.test_name_zh: 衝擊測試（LER 動力和 VAP 應用）
tests.test_name_en: Shock Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications)
tests.applicability: 輕軌（LER）動力和車輛輔助電源（VAP）應用

conditions.waveform: 半正弦波或按標準規定

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護控制正常

exemptions: 僅適用於 LER 動力和 VAP 應用
若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 29 Shock Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications): The sample is subjected to mechanical shock. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

tests.test_name_zh: 擠壓測試（LER 動力和 VAP 應用）
tests.test_name_en: Crush Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications)
tests.applicability: 輕軌（LER）動力和車輛輔助電源（VAP）應用

conditions.force: 按標準規定或車輛預期的最大擠壓負載
conditions.direction: 代表車輛碰撞時最可能受擠壓的方向

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無可燃氣體、無有毒氣體

exemptions: 僅適用於 LER 動力和 VAP 應用
若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 30 Crush Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications): The sample is crushed in a direction representative of vehicle collision. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V.

conditions.force: 按標準規定（模擬安裝/維護時的靜態負載）

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護控制正常

tests.original_text_snippet: 31 Static Force Test: The sample is subjected to static force in multiple directions. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護控制正常

tests.original_text_snippet: 32 Impact Test: The sample is subjected to impact in multiple directions. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

tests.applicability: 機架式模組（field installation in rack-mount）

conditions.orientation: 最可能產生不利結果的位置

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸、無可燃氣體、無電擊、無洩漏、無破裂、保護控制正常

exemptions: 僅適用於機架式模組
tests.original_text_snippet: 33 Drop Impact Test: Modules intended for rack-mount installation are dropped from specified height. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, S, L, R, P.

tests.test_name_zh: 壁掛固定裝置/支撐結構/把手測試

conditions.load: 按標準規定（模擬安裝/維護時的負載）

criteria.description: 固定裝置/支撐結構/把手不應失效

exemptions: 僅適用於壁掛式電池系統
tests.original_text_snippet: 34 Wall Mount Fixture/Handle Test: Wall-mount fixtures are tested for structural integrity. Fixture shall not fail.

conditions.load: 按標準規定（模擬長期應力）

criteria.description: 外殼不應有過度變形或失效

tests.original_text_snippet: 35 Mold Stress Test: Enclosure materials are tested for resistance to mold stress at elevated temperature. No excessive deformation shall occur.

conditions.pressure: 按標準規定（模擬內部壓力 buildup）

criteria.description: 壓力釋放裝置應在規定壓力下動作

exemptions: ASME 認證的壓力釋放裝置可豁免
電池內置的安全閥可豁免
tests.original_text_snippet: 36 Pressure Release Test: Relief valves or rupture members shall operate at specified pressure. ASME stamped devices are exempt.

conditions.pressure: 按標準規定（模擬壓力釋放啟動）

criteria.description: 壓力釋放裝置的啟動壓力應符合規格

exemptions: ASME 認證的壓力釋放裝置可豁免
tests.original_text_snippet: 37 Start-To-Discharge Test: Relief devices shall operate at specified start-to-discharge pressure.

tests.test_name_zh: 溫度循環測試（LER 動力和 VAP 應用）
tests.test_name_en: Thermal Cycling Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications)
tests.applicability: 輕軌（LER）動力和車輛輔助電源（VAP）應用

conditions.cycle_profile: 按標準規定（高低溫循環）

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護控制正常

exemptions: 僅適用於 LER 動力和 VAP 應用
若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 38 Thermal Cycling Test (LER Motive and VAP Applications): The sample is subjected to temperature cycles. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護控制正常

tests.original_text_snippet: 39 Resistance to Moisture Test: The sample is exposed to high humidity environment. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

criteria.description: 應無起火、無爆炸等；保護控制正常

tests.original_text_snippet: 40 Salt Fog Test: The sample is exposed to salt fog. Non-compliant results: E, F, C, V, S, L, R, P.

tests.test_name_zh: 外部火災暴露測試（拋射物危害）
tests.test_name_en: External Fire Exposure for Projectile Hazards Test

criteria.description: 應無爆炸（避免拋射物危害）

tests.original_text_snippet: 41 External Fire Exposure for Projectile Hazards Test: The sample is exposed to external fire. No explosion (projectile hazard) shall occur.

tests.test_name_zh: 單電池失效設計容差測試（鋰離子）
tests.test_name_en: Single Cell Failure Design Tolerance (Lithium Ion)

conditions.trigger_method: 使用內部短路觸發電池（見 Annex F）

criteria.description: 單電池失效不應導致內部火災傳播至 DUT 外殼外部

exemptions: 若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 42.2 Single cell failure design tolerance (lithium ion): A trigger cell initiates thermal runaway. Internal fire shall not spread to outside of the DUT enclosure.

tests.test_name_zh: 單電池失效設計容差測試（其他技術）
tests.test_name_en: Single Cell Failure Design Tolerance (Other Technologies)

conditions.trigger_method: 按電池技術使用適當的失效觸發方法

criteria.description: 單電池失效不應導致內部火災傳播至 DUT 外殼外部

exemptions: 若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
tests.original_text_snippet: 42.3 Single cell failure design tolerance (other technologies): A cell failure is triggered. Internal fire shall not spread to outside of the DUT enclosure.

conditions.reference: 參考 Annex E 詳細測試條件

criteria.description: 按 Annex E 規定的測試方法和判定標準

tests.original_text_snippet: Annex E Cell Test Program: Includes short circuit, cell impact, drop impact, heating, overcharge, forced discharge, and projectile tests for secondary lithium cells.

exemptions_summary.exemption: 僅適用於 LER（輕軌）動力和 VAP（車輛輔助電源）應用
僅適用於壁掛式電池系統
ASME 認證的壓力釋放裝置可豁免；電池內置的安全閥可豁免
若固態電路和軟體不被用作主要安全保護，可豁免
若子組件被認定為可代表完整電池系統，可在子組件層級進行測試
若通過分析確定冷卻系統不運作不會產生危險，可豁免

metadata.extraction_method: Manual reading and analysis of complete .md file (PDF extraction)
metadata.ocr_quality_notes: OCR 品質良好，使用 PDF 直接提取，英文內容完整，章節編號清晰。UL 1973 是北美固定式和車輛輔助電源電池系統的基礎安全標準，涵蓋電氣、機械、環境、EMC、內部失效等測試。部分頁面有版權水印但不影響內容提取。
